'''pongapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twattish|twattish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twattish|twattish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pongapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pongapithi|pongapithi]] || [[word:pongapiji|pongapiji]] || [[word:pongapishi|pongapishi]] || [[word:pongapiki|pongapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pongaputhuthu|pongaputhuthu]] || [[word:pongapujuju|pongapujuju]] || [[word:pongapushushu|pongapushushu]] || [[word:pongapukuku|pongapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pongaputhu|pongaputhu]] || [[word:pongapuju|pongapuju]] || [[word:pongapushu|pongapushu]] || [[word:pongapuku|pongapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pongapufthuf|pongapufthuf]] || [[word:pongapufjuf|pongapufjuf]] || [[word:pongapufshuf|pongapufshuf]] || [[word:pongapufkuf|pongapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pongapethe|pongapethe]] || [[word:pongapeje|pongapeje]] || [[word:pongapeshe|pongapeshe]] || [[word:pongapeke|pongapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pongapothotho|pongapothotho]] || [[word:pongapojojo|pongapojojo]] || [[word:pongaposhosho|pongaposhosho]] || [[word:pongapokoko|pongapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pongapotho|pongapotho]] || [[word:pongapojo|pongapojo]] || [[word:pongaposho|pongaposho]] || [[word:pongapoko|pongapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pongapofthof|pongapofthof]] || [[word:pongapofjof|pongapofjof]] || [[word:pongapofshof|pongapofshof]] || [[word:pongapofkof|pongapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pongapïfthïf|pongapïfthïf]] || [[word:pongapïfjïf|pongapïfjïf]] || [[word:pongapïfshïf|pongapïfshïf]] || [[word:pongapïfkïf|pongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pongapïfthïfthïf|pongapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:pongapïfjïfjïf|pongapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:pongapïfshïfshïf|pongapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:pongapïfkïfkïf|pongapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pongapïfthïf|pongapïfthïf]] || [[word:pongapïfjïf|pongapïfjïf]] || [[word:pongapïfshïf|pongapïfshïf]] || [[word:pongapïfkïf|pongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pongapïfthïf|pongapïfthïf]] || [[word:pongapïfjïf|pongapïfjïf]] || [[word:pongapïfshïf|pongapïfshïf]] || [[word:pongapïfkïf|pongapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pongapæthæ|pongapæthæ]] || [[word:pongapæjæ|pongapæjæ]] || [[word:pongapæshæ|pongapæshæ]] || [[word:pongapækæ|pongapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pongapathatha|pongapathatha]] || [[word:pongapajaja|pongapajaja]] || [[word:pongapashasha|pongapashasha]] || [[word:pongapakaka|pongapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pongapatha|pongapatha]] || [[word:pongapaja|pongapaja]] || [[word:pongapasha|pongapasha]] || [[word:pongapaka|pongapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pongapafthaf|pongapafthaf]] || [[word:pongapafjaf|pongapafjaf]] || [[word:pongapafshaf|pongapafshaf]] || [[word:pongapafkaf|pongapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pongapasha|pongapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pongapshësha|pongapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pongaprosha|pongaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pongapmusha|pongapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pongapyasha|pongapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopongapnkshësha|gopongapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopongapnkrosha|gopongapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopongapnkmusha|gopongapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopongapnkyasha|gopongapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pongangapasha|pongangapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pongangapshësha|pongangapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pongangaprosha|pongangaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pongangapmusha|pongangapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pongangapyasha|pongangapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopongangapnkshësha|gopongangapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopongangapnkrosha|gopongangapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopongangapnkmusha|gopongangapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopongangapnkyasha|gopongangapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pengæpasha|pengæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pengæpshësha|pengæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pengæprosha|pengæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pengæpmusha|pengæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pengæpyasha|pengæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopengæpnkshësha|gopengæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopengæpnkrosha|gopengæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopengæpnkmusha|gopengæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopengæpnkyasha|gopengæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pongfapasha|pongfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pongfapshësha|pongfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pongfaprosha|pongfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pongfapmusha|pongfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pongfapyasha|pongfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopongfapnkshësha|gopongfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopongfapnkrosha|gopongfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopongfapnkmusha|gopongfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopongfapnkyasha|gopongfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
